item.title: History Is Hot: Day Four “Helen Mirren at 20, as Cleopatra”
item.description: (I fixed my titles to match my username) Here we see a right prim stargazer! It’s none other than a 20-year-old Helen Mirren (aged like fine wine!) dressed for her role as Cleopatra in a theatrical production, circa 1965. BONUS FACT: Cleopatra lived and ruled closer to the era of the iPhone / Social Media than to the building of the pyramids which her image (and other Egyptians) is so commonly bundled together with. WHO AM I: IT DOESN’T MATTER! WHAT DO I DO: IM JUST HERE TO PUT SOME SWEET, JUICY, DELICIOUS HISTORY ALL UP IN YOUR EAGER FACES - THREE TIMES DAILY! WISH TO BE NOTIFIED? WELL THEN JOIN THE TAGLIST YOU DIRTY LITTLE HISTORY BIRDY! DROP A COMMENT AND ILL POP YOU INTO THE ROSTER *calls at 1am* Okay Peace Out Sweet Cheeks’
item.dc:creator: HistoryIsHot

item.title: Hot Sauce Hero
item.description: 16-year-old Lev Burstein is heating homes with homemade hot sauce. After founding his company Hot Sauce 4 Heat, the teen began donating proceeds from sales to help families pay for heat in Philadelphia, where thousands can’t afford to pay their heating bills in winter.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: Feel good Friday
item.dc:creator: BigOChicago

item.title: Russia has begun bombing western Ukraine
item.description: Russia has begun bombing western Ukraine Strikes were inflicted on the territories of Lutsk and Ivano-Frankivsk. An airfield came under fire in Lutsk. According to preliminary information, six explosions took place there, as a result of which fuel tanks exploded. In Ivano-Frankivsk, citizens also counted six bombs, some of which also fell on the local airfield.
item.dc:creator: maksmixalets365

item.title: I’d watch this show
item.description:
https://twitter.com/michaelharriot/status/1502105581146054659
https://www.smithsonianmag.com/history/starving-settlers-in-jamestown-colony-resorted-to-cannibalism-46000815/
https://www.americanway.com/articles/what-happens-when-the-descendant-of-an-enslaved-person-tours-charleston-plantations/
Searching through Google Books reveals this to have been one of the sources used so you can make up your own mind which family this is about: https://www.google.com/books/edition/The_Rumph_and_Frederick_Families_Genealo/CbJOAAAAMAAJ?hl=en&gbpv=0
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: They say you never forget your first
item.dc:creator: m0nikerLoopy209

item.title: Heartstopping moment
item.description:
A hero trainee nurse has helped save the life of a toddler after he heard her mother's screams while on his way to work. Nicholas Jensen, 44, immediately leapt into action by scooping up the motionless child, who was turning blue, and running through the grounds of Princess Alexandra Hospital in Brisbane. CCTV footage shows Mr Jensen holding the toddler, who was foaming at the mouth, in a recovery position as he sprints to the Emergency Department with the mother following behind. Once inside he immediately beelines for a resuscitation room where a team of doctors and nurses stream in and begin lifesaving treatment.
The child had an atypical febrile convulsion which can be brought about by viral infection and fever. She is now doing fine after spending two days in hospital, much to the delight of her mother and hospital staff. Mr Jensen had previously been a stone mason before switching careers and going into nursing.
In the moment adrenalin and my training kicked in,' he said, though he did admit he was a little shaken later that day. 'This is why I got into this job, great job satisfaction. It is a meaningful career.' While Mr Jensen is yet to finish his training his response to the situation has already impressed his colleagues Video link https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-10596857/Moment-toddler-foaming-mouth-turning-blue-saved-trainee-nurse.html Edit : thanks for upvotes great comments ,please learn first aid ,
item.dc:creator: sirlapins

item.title: Awful images ... but a happy ending
item.description: Source: https://metro.co.uk/2022/03/10/northumberland-couple-jailed-after-almost-starving-dog-to-death-16254519/ FP EDIT: Not the story I'd have wished to get my first front page from, but thank you for the votes. I'm glad I'm not the only one who thought she was peeing in that second-to-last pic! It's a path on the hill below.

item.title: Maybe Not Sorry, Eh?
item.description: Source: https://spacenews.com/canada-answers-ukraines-call-for-satellite-radar-imagery/ TL/dr: Ukraine is now being given real time troop movements, but on a much more comprehensive and focused scale. This is not a new technology, but seems enhanced with extras data. Scary for the bad guys, and I bet we hear some barking from the panic room soon over it. Snippets from post: “Images captured by MDA’s SAR technology, which is unique for its ability to see through all weather and cloud conditions, will be merged and analyzed with other sources of imagery from commercial Earth observation companies to develop comprehensive near real-time intelligence reports for Ukrainian government officials,” "MDA’s imagery will be shared with a commercial space partner in the United States. The imagery will then be merged and analyzed with additional imagery collected by other Earth observation companies, and intelligence reports will then be shared with the Government of Ukraine."
item.dc:creator: Hashtagdelta
